result.stdout:
CodeGuard - DI Lifecycle Auditor

Usage: dotnet codeguard <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>              Path to solution (.sln, .slnx) or project (.csproj) file

Options:
  --format <format>   Output format: console (default), json, sarif, html
  --output <file>     Write report to file instead of stdout
  --verbose           Enable verbose output
  --rewrite           Automatically rewrite registration code with recommendations
  --help, -h          Show this help message

Examples:
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln --format json
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln --format json --output report.json
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln --format html --output report.html
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln --format sarif --output results.sarif
  dotnet codeguard src/MyApp/MyApp.csproj --verbose
  dotnet codeguard MyApp.sln --rewrite

Exit Codes:
  0  Success - no issues found
  1  Warnings found
  2  Errors found or invalid arguments
